bettercombatextension.client.enable_pose: When set to false, weapon poses are not displayed while the player is sprinting.
bettercombatextension.server.attack_pitc:
Only has an effect when 'restrict_attack_pitch' is set to 'true'.
Describes the angle from 0, which means the final range is from -'attack_pitch_range' to 'attack_pitch_range'.
bettercombatextension.server.disable_bet: Disables Better Combat's formerly client feature of continuously attacking while holding down the attack key.
bettercombatextension.server.empty_offha:
Enables an alternative two_handed condition.
If the offhand stack is empty and this is true, the mainhand stack is two_handed
This is not active if the 'two_handed' field in the weapon_attribute file is set to true.
bettercombatextension.server.enable_expe: Enable Experimental Swap Hand Attributes Algorithm

In 1.21.1, Better Combats attacking with weapons in the offhand slot is incompatible with RPG Inventory
Setting this option to true, fixes the incompatibility.

This is an experimental fix and may have unexpected consequences.
Please report any issues you encounter when using this setting
bettercombatextension.server.enable_jump:
When set to true, jumping is disabled during attacks.

Use the item tag 'disables_jump_restriction_during_attack' and the entity type tag 'disables_jump_restriction_when_ridden' to control when the jump restriction is applied.
bettercombatextension.server.enable_move:
When set to true, changing the players orientation and position while attacking is disabled.
It is recommended to install Shoulder Surfing Reloaded, play in the third person perspective and activate the decoupled camera setting.
Since the movement_multiplier setting in the Better Combat server config has no effect when this is set to true, it is recommended to set it to its default of 1.0.
Use the item tag 'disables_movement_locking_during_attack' and the entity type tag 'disables_movement_locking_when_ridden' to control when the movement locking is applied.
bettercombatextension.server.feinting_in: When set to true, feinting an attack skips it.
bettercombatextension.server.global_atta: The stamina cost of an attack is multiplied with this value when the attack is executed.
bettercombatextension.server.global_fein: The stamina cost of an attack is multiplied with this value when the attack is feinted.
bettercombatextension.server.restrict_at: When set to true, the pitch of the players attack is restricted.
bettercombatextension.server.use_entity_:
When set to true, the 'minecraft:player.entity_interaction_range' entity attribute is used to determine the attack range.
It is recommended to set the 'isTooltipAttackRangeEnabled' value in the Better Combat client config to false, as it no longer displays the correct value.
